_description: Path mapping for Steam Deck running RetroDeck (Flatpak app, host-side daemon).
_saves_root_note: Informational only. Runtime path construction uses $CONTINUITY_SAVES_ROOT from the PAL, which reads saves_path from RetroDeck's live config (~/.var/app/net.retrodeck.retrodeck/config/retrodeck/retrodeck.json). rdhome defaults to /home/deck/retrodeck and is user-relocatable (SD-card installs) — NOT the Flatpak data dir.
_container_note: RetroDeck ships RetroArch with save_file_compression=false (components repo retroarch.cfg:3232) — raw .srm confirmed against upstream source. Compressed (rzip) saves quarantine until the Phase 3 codec integration.
_states_note: RetroDeck ships savestate_file_compression=true — state backups arrive RZIP-compressed and are archived verbatim (opaque one-way backup, format-matrix §7).
_rom_roots_note: Informational. Runtime ROM-anchoring reads $CONTINUITY_ROMS_ROOT from the PAL (roms_path in retrodeck.json), not this field. Saves sort into saves/<system>/ via RetroArch's sort_savefiles_by_content_enable — the <system> dir mirrors the ROM's immediate parent folder, so nested ROM layouts are unsupported.
